commandRuns.result: 6 passed (repeat-each=3); happy path + OperationFailure fallback both green

assertionResults.reason: The create-bootstrap Vitest suite proves `window.__iglooTestGetRuntimeSource()` is installed and returns `relay_pump` after `createProfile` with a valid relay, while the live multi-device spec waits for the same DEV hook to report `relay_pump` on `/create/distribute` before proceeding through the real adoption flow.

The focused provider suite covers the atomic per-share `encodeDistributionPackage(idx, password)` behavior: exactly one onboard dispatch per click, correct target peer x-only pubkey, persisted request id, and zero onboard dispatches before any click.

The live multi-device Playwright spec passed on all three repetitions, exercising Device A `/create/distribute` → Device B real `/onboard` UI → Device A auto-flip to `Distributed` within the expected echo path, plus the documented OperationFailure fallback path.

The create-bootstrap runtime suite directly covers the relay validation matrix: `wss://` accepted, `ws://example.com` rejected with the canonical error, `ws://localhost:*` rejected even with the DEV flag, and `ws://127.0.0.1:*` accepted only when the DEV opt-in is enabled.

summary: Runtime/bootstrap/dispatched-onboard proof set passed cleanly: 3 commands run, 4 assigned assertions passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
